purpose: All custom exception classes. Single file. All inherit from UCGenError.

ProviderUnavailableError.example: ProviderUnavailableError(provider='ollama', hint='Is Ollama running? Try: ollama serve')

children.EntitiesParseError: Stage 3 failed after retry — non-fatal, has fallback

AssemblerError.note: Jinja2 rendering failure — should never happen with valid models

JSONExtractError.note: No valid JSON found in LLM output

ProjectFileError.note: ucgen.yaml missing, invalid, or PyYAML not installed
